content.en:
In the ten eternal years since Ye Tian broke through to the Legendary Realm Lord, he has been stabilizing the realm, silently improving his eternal power and physical strength, and has not attacked the Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

Soon, ten eternal years passed

As a result, Ye Tian began to impact the initial realm

The gap between the Ordinary Legendary Realm Lord and the Initial Realm Lord is not large, but compared to the top existence in the Initial Realm, the gap between the Ordinary Legendary Realm Lord is too big.

For other Legendary Realm Lords, how to fuse the Will and the Innate Eternal Rules is an extremely difficult step, and Legendary Lords like the Ice Han Lord have not taken this step, so they will continue to look for various cultivation secret techniques that integrate the will with the Innate Eternal Rules, so as to seek a breakthrough point.

Among the five current Legendary Lords of the Time and Space Territory, Ye Tian estimated that only the Holy Peak Lord had truly broken through to the initial realm, but it was only suspicious, because the Holy Peak Lord hid the "One Zero Three" relatively deeply, and if he did not show his true strength, with Ye Tian's current cultivation realm, it would be difficult to penetrate his realm at a glance

Ye Tian began to fuse his will, body, and innate eternal rules, and this process did not encounter any shackles at all, and soon the three aspects began to merge, producing a higher-level power.

In the space-time territory and the Source Sea, there is no description or definition of this power, but in the Immeasurable Sea, the power after the fusion of the body, will, and innate eternal rules is called the Eternal Force, which is a higher-level version of the eternal power.

The Eternal Force was born, and Ye Tian's body underwent a slight change, but due to the low degree of fusion, this transformation was not very obvious.

This degree of fusion is the same as the level of the Immortal Realm Lord, and it is also divided into ten percent, once it is fused to ten percent, it is equivalent to the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, and from zero to ninety out of nine, it belongs to the Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

Since Ye Tian's own will and the innate eternal rules were fused a lot, at the beginning of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord Realm, cultivation was very easy, and there were no bottlenecks.

It only took less than an eternal year, Ye Tian's cultivation reached the third step of the Initial Realm Legendary Lord, that is, the degree of fusion of body, will, and innate eternal rules reached thirty percent, and thirty percent of the eternal force was born inside the body.

This kind of strength is naturally much stronger than the Initial Realm Legendary Lord who has just broken through.

Moreover, Ye Tian is also trying to create the Legendary Eternal Technique, and with the prototype, it is not far from being truly created.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Moshan Prison, and he was ready to challenge those Legendary Realm Lord prisoners in the Moshan Prison

Not only could he fight these Legendary Realm Lord prisoners to enhance his combat experience, but he also had the opportunity to benefit from them, so it would be no problem to send a replica body to fight here for a long time.

As a result, Ye Tian entered the prison of one of the Legendary Realm Lord Prisoners.

Ye Nai Legendary Realm Lord is called Shu Sea Lord.Ye Tian entered the Shu Sea Lord's prison and met this Shu Sea Lord.

"Origin Realm Legendary Lord!" Ye Yu saw through the other party's cultivation realm

If you are more specific, this Shuhai Lord's cultivation is the fifth step of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord, and his body contains fifty percent of the Eternal Primordial Realm, which is even higher than Ye Tian's cultivation

However, a high level of cultivation does not mean that the combat effectiveness is stronger.

For example, Ye Tian's foundation is very sufficient, and he has created many top-notch legendary eternal skills, and is even about to create a legendary-level eternal technique, if it is with the help of the Mixed Yuan Order, it can be comparable to the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm.

However, Ye Tian did not mobilize the two eternal treasures of the Mixed Yuan Order and Jia Lanye, but relied on his own strength to fight with the other party.

Fighting with the Lord of Shuhai, Ye Tian found that the other party's use of the Eternal Force had reached a very superb level, which was worth learning from Ye Tian.

In addition, the Lord of Shu Sea also possesses a number of top-notch legendary eternal techniques, and is proficient in a variety of eternal paths.

Without the help of the Mixed Yuan Order and Jia Lanye, Ye Tian could only barely compete with the other party, and it was a little difficult to completely defeat the other party.

Ye Tian also knew that all the legendary lords who had been imprisoned here for endless years were not simple, so he didn't feel strange at all.

In this way, in the long years that followed, Ye Tian's replica body found one Legendary Realm Lord prisoner after another, and with the help of their hands, he honed his combat power and the run-in of the Legendary Realm Lord level, and became more proficient in the use of the Eternal Force.

After many eternal years, Ye Tian's cultivation has not improved much, but his combat power can already suppress the Lord of Shuhai.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of eternal years have passed.

After such a long period of penance, Ye Tian's cultivation had greatly increased.

Now, he has reached the seventh step of the Initial Realm Lord, and his whole body contains seventy percent of the Eternal Force, and his physical strength is far beyond 0........ ，

Other than that.

He has also created Legendary Eternal Skills, and there are more than one, but they are basically based on the top Legendary Eternal Skills from before.

For example, the Void Step, the Hundred Million Void, the Void True Body, the Will Wall Light, and the Will Slash Void Sword have all become legendary eternal skills.

If you use the Mixed Yuan Order, these Legendary-level Eternal Skills can all get a certain increase, and with the Mixed Yuan Order, you can form a kind of will rule field similar to the Legendary Lord of the Realm Realm, and your strength will naturally become stronger.

With Ye Tian's current strength, he could easily suppress any Origin Realm Legendary Lord.

"My current conventional combat power should be comparable to the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, and with the help of the two Eternal Treasures of the Mixed Yuan Order and the Jialan Leaf, I may even hope to compete with the Legendary Lord of the Realm Realm. Ye Tian said confidently.

Even in the Infinite Sea, there are not many Realm Legendary Lords, and they can definitely be regarded as overlords.

-

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

A group of people were shuttling around quickly, and one of them was the Dark Mist Lord that Ye Tian knew.

At this moment, the Lord of the Dark Mist was respectfully communicating with a Legendary Lord.

"Young Master Qin Yu, it won't be long before we can reach the space-time territory of the Source Sea. The Lord of the Mist said.

The Legendary Realm Lord, who was called Young Master Qin Yu, said in a cold voice: "Dark Mist Lord, you said that your Source Sea is very weak, there are only six Legendary Lords, and one or even two Eternal Treasures, if this news is wrong, it will delay me by 0.9 for so long, I can't spare you." "

"Young Master Qin Yu, I don't dare to deceive you, what I said is true, I only hope that Young Master Qin Yu can help me kill that Nine-Step Immortal Realm Lord. The Lord of the Dark Mist hurriedly said.

"Don't worry, it's just an Immortal Realm Lord, I can kill the other party with a wave of my hand!" Young Master Qin Yu said confidently.

The Lord of the Dark Mist knew that Qin Yu was not bragging, but really had this strength.

Qin Yu is a legendary lord at the peak of the Initial Realm of the Infinite Sea, and he is only one step away from the Consummation Realm, and he also has an Eternal Treasure on his body, and his own strength is even stronger than the ordinary Consummation Realm.

He inadvertently found the Infinite Sea and was caught by Qin Yu, so he exchanged the news of the Source Sea and the Eternal Treasure for his life, and now he has completely taken refuge in Qin Yu.

"Endless Lord, when I descend on the Source Sea, you will be dead!"

The Lord of the Dark Mist said secretly. _
